subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast turned thy face to the Kingdom of God! Well done, well done, that thou hast been drawn by the fragrant breathings wafting from the gardens of the Covenant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من توجه الی ملکوت الله احسنت ثم احسنت بما انجذبت بنفحات عبقت من ریاض میثاق
subcodes.subjects: @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @call to action, @praise and encouragement
